doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo contradicts actual Florida law requiring LFO payment for rights restoration and references a court ruling and policy reversal that do not exist.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: There is no "Jones v. DeSantis" case (the relevant case is Jones v. Florida Secretary of State / Jones v. DeSantis was actually titled differently), and Florida has not eliminated the LFO requirement—this contradicts known Florida law and policy.
